deprecations.name: pd.DataFrame.append
deprecations.message: pandas.DataFrame.append() is deprecated since pandas 1.4.0 and removed in 2.0

deprecations.name: pd.DataFrame.iteritems
deprecations.message: DataFrame.iteritems() is deprecated, use DataFrame.items() instead

deprecations.name: np.float
deprecations.message: np.float is deprecated, use Python builtin float instead

deprecations.name: np.int
deprecations.message: np.int is deprecated, use Python builtin int instead

deprecations.name: np.bool
deprecations.message: np.bool is deprecated, use Python builtin bool instead

deprecations.name: np.str
deprecations.message: np.str is deprecated, use Python builtin str instead

deprecations.name: requests.packages.urllib3
deprecations.message: Accessing urllib3 via requests.packages is deprecated

deprecations.name: flask.Markup
deprecations.message: flask.Markup is deprecated, use markupsafe.Markup instead

deprecations.name: flask.json.jsonify
deprecations.message: flask.json.jsonify is deprecated in favor of flask.jsonify

deprecations.name: django.utils.encoding.smart_text
deprecations.message: smart_text is deprecated, use smart_str instead

deprecations.name: django.conf.urls.url
deprecations.message: django.conf.urls.url() is deprecated, use re_path() or path()

deprecations.name: unittest.TestCase.assertEquals
deprecations.message: assertEquals is deprecated, use assertEqual instead

deprecations.name: collections.MutableMapping
deprecations.message: collections.MutableMapping moved to collections.abc in Python 3.3+

deprecations.name: collections.MutableSequence
deprecations.message: collections.MutableSequence moved to collections.abc in Python 3.3+
